title: DEVOI
description: A pvp pack port that aims improve the visuals of the game, while making the game look smoother and more appealing.
body:
# What This Pack Adds
Low Fire, Low Shield, 32x Blocks, Better Armor Textures, 32x Textures for Items, Better Crit and Enchanted Hit Particles, 32x GUI

## This Pack Is Made For All Modern Versions.
## Q&A
### Will this pack affect my performace?
No, this pack should not affect your performace ingame.

### Will this work with my other texturepacks?
Yes, as long as you have it on top of your other packs, it should work fine.

### Do I need any mods to have the pack work correctly?
You don't need any mods to make the texturepack work.
